description: Letter addressed to Moshe b. Yehuda, in Alexandria. Dating: Last quarter of the 15th century. Only the beginning and the address are preserved. The sender reports that Moshe's letters reached him and ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz al-Qarqashūnī(?).
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
